privacy_model: Local dictation, no telemetry, no cloud transcription endpoint

network_calls.name: first_launch_model_download
network_calls.when: First launch, until the model weights are cached locally
network_calls.purpose: FluidAudio downloads the Parakeet TDT v3 CoreML model weights
network_calls.data_sent: Standard HTTPS request metadata; no dictation audio

network_calls.name: update_check
network_calls.when: Every 6 hours when automatic update checks are enabled, plus one check shortly after launch
network_calls.purpose: Check whether a newer Parakey release is available
network_calls.data_sent: Anonymous GET; no app identifier, transcript, microphone audio, settings, or usage counts

network_calls.name: update_apply
network_calls.when: Only when the user chooses to update through the menu or Homebrew
network_calls.purpose: Homebrew downloads the signed release archive
network_calls.data_sent: Homebrew update/install request metadata; no dictation audio

local_storage.transcripts: Recent transcript history is in memory only and clears on quit
